## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

Example: "I need to rate limit based on API key tiers, but currently..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see.

```typescript
// Example API, if applicable
const limiter = new RateCraft({
  // ...
});
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Use Case

Explain the real-world scenario where this feature would be useful.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or examples from other libraries.
